raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California State Legislature passed a legislative package called 'A Call to Action' to improve safety at higher education institutions.",
    "Assembly Bill 2047 establishes a systemwide Office of Civil Rights to oversee policies at the California State University and University of California.",
    "Assembly Bill 2047 requires each UC and CSU campus to establish a campus-based Title IX office to address sexual harassment complaints.",
    "Assembly Bill 2048 requires California Community Colleges to report to the Legislature by December 1, 2025, with recommendations to prevent and address sexual harassment.",
    "Assembly Bill 2608 requires campuses to include drug-facilitated sexual assault prevention training in their sexual harassment training.",
    "Assembly Bill 2987 mandates California Community Colleges and California State University to provide timely updates on outcomes of sex discrimination and sexual harassment cases.",
    "Assembly Bill 810 requires all public higher education institutions to implement employment verification checks for applicants for positions with substantiated allegations of misconduct.",
    "Assembly Bill 2407 requires the California State Auditor to conduct an audit every three years to examine the ability of California Community Colleges, California State University, and University of California to address and prevent sexual harassment."
  ]
}
```
